text:
A little housekeeping, a little heavy lifting. Shipped a few things this week to make the infrastructure hum a bit better.

- Video resolutions finally behave. We unified the system so your pixels actually resolve exactly how you want them to.
- Bumped GLM up to 5 and added ElevenLabs Scribe v2 for STT. Heavier models for text and audio, handled quietly in the background.
- Fixed the dashboard tier panels so the colors actually match your active tier. Aesthetic harmony restored.

All live via the API. Go build something weird.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #webdev #generativeai #developerlife
